description: Moses — Canon versioning. Every Canon amendment is recorded with version, date, reason, and the finding that prompted it. The law was revealed progressively and updated as the community's situation changed.

sections: string — which Canon sections were affected
schema.promptedBy: string — what trial finding, Ecclesiastes report, or user request prompted this
schema.previousText: string — what the Canon said before (for reversibility)

note: The Canon is absolute but not immutable. It evolves through progressive revelation. Every change is recorded so the system can understand why the law is what it is — and what it used to be.
